title: QSMP Plush
body:
[Optifine required]

Texture pack that adds the plush of QSMP server players (I know some skins are missing, but they'll be available in a future version)

Just rename a paper with the name of the plush you want:
```
Cellbit Plush
Felps Plush
Mike Plush
Pac Plush

AntoineDaniel Plush
Aypierre Plush
Baghera Plush
Etoiles Plush
Kameto Plush

German Plush
IronMouse Plush
Lenay Plush
Nihachu Plush
Polispol Plush
Rivers Plush
TinaKitten Plush
Tubbo Plush
Willyrex Plush

Arin Plush
BadBoyHalo Plush
Cucurucho Plush
EIMariana Plush
Fit Plush
Foolish Plush
Jaiden Plush
Luzu Plush
Maximus Plush
Missasinfonia Plush
Philza Plush
Quackity Plush

Bagi Plush
Carre Plush
```
